mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly payroll growth above 150,000 persons signals robust labor demand and rising household income, which drives consumer spending and corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive 20-day forward returns occur in less than 55% of months where PAYEMS growth exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 3.5% and inflation (CPIAUCSL) rises more than 0.3% month-over-month, the Fed enters a tightening regime that compresses equity valuations and reduces forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 3.64% and CPIAUCSL at 326.588 as of 2017-01-15
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) above 1.2 million units annualized signal strong residential investment and forward economic momentum, driving positive equity returns over 5 trading days as market reprices growth expectations.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in < 50% of triggered instances, or correlation between HOUST and 5-day SPX returns is not statistically significant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) growth decelerates below 1.5% year-over-year while unemployment (UNRATE) rises above 4.5%, signaling supply-side weakness and labor market softening that reduces corporate profitability and equity valuations over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 102.325 and UNRATE at 4.3% as of 2017-01-15
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or the joint effect of INDPRO and UNRATE on returns is not statistically significant (interaction p > 0.15).

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales (RSAFS) growth accelerates above 4% year-over-year, indicating strong consumer demand and rising corporate revenues, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive 20-day forward returns occur in < 52% of months where RSAFS YoY growth exceeds 4%.

mechanism_narrative: When real interest rates (approximated by FEDFUNDS minus CPIAUCSL inflation rate) turn negative, equity risk premiums compress and forward returns increase over 60 trading days as investors seek yield in equities.
evidence_refs: fact:Real rates near zero in early 2017
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.01 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate (UNRATE) falls below 4.5% while payroll growth (PAYEMS) remains above 150k monthly, signaling tight labor markets and wage pressure that increases corporate costs and reduces forward equity returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 4.3% and PAYEMS at 158627 thousand as of 2017-01-31
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or the interaction effect between UNRATE and PAYEMS on returns is not statistically significant (p > 0.15).

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) accelerates above 103.0 index level, signaling robust manufacturing activity and supply-side strength that supports corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in < 50% of triggered instances, or correlation between INDPRO and 5-day SPX returns is not statistically significant (p > 0.10).
